## Layer

- [ ] Fork-specific (build pipeline, repo-meta, fork-side CI)
- [ ] Bug fix that should also go upstream
- [ ] Security patch (please follow SECURITY.md privately first)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / tooling only
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Breaking change (describe migration)

## Checklist

- [ ] `poetry run pytest` is green locally
- [ ] `poetry run pre-commit run --all-files` is clean
- [ ] README and docs updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
